full_text:
Zhou Kui 周逵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhou Kui (周逵)was born in Xiapi. Chen Qun predicted he would not do well and Kui was later executed. Zhou Kui was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
